patch.value: Enhance check-secrets.mjs with private IP detection rule

Added private-ip regex rule to scripts/check-secrets.mjs detecting RFC1918 addresses (10.x, 172.16-31.x, 192.168.x). Scanner now catches 32 legacy IP references in .agents/pm history/item files. No source code or config files contain private IPs.

author: audit-agent

patch.value: Resolution normalized from closed status because the field was missing or low-signal.

message: Backfill resolution metadata for closed items missing resolution fields
